narrative:
Bay Village-04-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 961 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.4 percentage points.
